name: spend-caps
description: Optional per-workspace monthly USD budget. checkSpendCap (internal) gates callForUser — once this month's estimated workspaceUsageDaily cost >= the workspace cap, new model calls throw quota_exceeded. setSpendCap (admin) / getSpendStatus (viewer) power a SpendCapCard bar.
notes: Reuses the EXISTING workspaces.capUsdPerMonth field (added in Phase 5) as the cap — this slice adds NO new table/column. Reads workspaceUsageDaily (by_ws_day) provided by the usage-rollups slice, so that slice + its rollupDay cron must be installed for spend to accumulate. Consumer must: wire the callForUser cap-check (see callForUserProposal in the build output), and add a nav entry rendering <SpendCapCard/> (or fold it beside <WorkspaceUsageCard/>). Enforcement is workspace-scoped only — undefined workspaceId (personal creds / MCP path) is NOT budgeted. Cost is an ESTIMATE from the rate table, not a real bill; the cap is a soft guardrail (checked before the call, so a single call can cross it).
